examples: As a result of the growing fears about home security, more people are arranging for someone to stay in their home when they're away.
We're only making plans and arranging things.
When arranging our work, we should allow for unforeseen circumstances.
The organization is also arranging a community meeting on posttraumatic stress disorder for early May.
But arranging both is tricky, even supposing that Japan can summon the will to do so.
